OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Leona Luckett.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Demetrius Hines is present.
Attorney L. Christine Siojo representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of APR-16-2012 is vacated.
